header: Edit your site where your visitors see it
subheadline: The Visual Editor puts editing on the rendered page itself — click a headline, type, publish. Backed by 244 elements with live page-module previews, built on Content Blocks 2.2 and Tailwind v4 for TYPO3 14.3+.

feature_items.label: Inline editing in the Visual Editor
Pro support from €49/month when you need it
